title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1627 - Payment program not made until sale closed and title or proprietary interest passed
text:
67.1627.  Payment program not made until sale closed and title or proprietary interest passed. — Except as otherwise provided in sections 67.1600 to 67.1663, payments under the program pursuant to section 67.1618 shall not be made until the sale of the guaranteed residence has closed and title has passed or the beneficial interest has been transferred.
(L. 1999 S.B. 20)
